prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via HKS GT-SS Supercharger kit (3.5L V35A-FTS twin-turbo V6) with 10.5 psi boost, intercooler upgrade to GReddy Type-25 FMIC, and supporting HKS Hi-Power SPL fuel pump to maintain stoichiometric AFR under 550whp (stock internals safe limit)

Full bolt-on exhaust system by Tomei Japan featuring 3.5-inch titanium-coated downpipes (catless), 70mm mid-pipes with resonated center section, and dual 100mm titanium exhaust tips (Tomei Ti-Tip) with integrated butterfly valves for backpressure control, paired with a custom ECU flash by Kaizen Tuning (OBD-II port reflash) to optimize ignition timing and fuel maps for 93 octane

Suspension overhaul with Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (LX 600-specific valving), polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF2000K) for subframe and control arms, and a full Whiteline alignment kit (camber bolts, rear toe arms) to achieve -2.5° front camber and -1.8° rear camber for track use, paired with Brembo GT 6-piston front (390mm rotors) and 4-piston rear (360mm rotors) big brake kit with Ferodo DS2500 pads
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (LX 600-specific, 50mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts, finished in Lexus Structural Blue with matte clear coat

Custom 22x11.5 ET15 front and 22x12.5 ET20 rear forged aluminum wheels by Work Emotion CR Kiwami (10.5J/12J widths) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30R22 front, 315/30R22 rear), paired with Duraflex wheel spacers (25mm front, 30mm rear) for flush fitment

Full interior carbon fiber overhaul by Seibon Carbon, including custom F Sport seats reupholstered in Alcantara with red stitching (by Status Auto), carbon fiber door cards, center console, and dashboard trim, with a custom roll cage by Cusco (bolt-in, 8-point) painted in Lexus Matte Black for rigidity and aesthetics
